name: null-guard
description: Bugfix recipe for null/undefined dereference errors. Adds defensive guard + test for the absent value path.

files.hint: File at the deref site: add early return / optional chaining / explicit fallback (DO NOT swallow with ?? '' silently if it changes business meaning)
Test file: add a test exercising the absent-value path (input is null/undefined/missing key)

checklist: Identify the exact deref site from stack trace (file:line)
Decide guard strategy: (a) early return + log/metric, (b) optional chaining ?.+ fallback ?? value, (c) throw with descriptive error if absence is a contract violation
Avoid silent ?? '' or ?? 0 if the absence indicates a real upstream bug — surface it with a metric or error
Add the guard — keep it 1-3 lines, do NOT refactor surrounding code
Add a test that reproduces the original failure (arrange null/undefined input)
Add a test that asserts the guard behavior (returns/throws/falls back correctly)
Run failing test first (verify it fails on old code), then run full test suite
Check upstream: should the value have been guaranteed earlier in the call chain? If yes, also fix upstream
